name: Particle Physics & HEP
description: Machine learning applications in high-energy physics, including the LHC experiments at CERN.

name: Jet Tagging
description: Classification of hadronic jets from quark/gluon/boson/top-quark origin.

name: Event Classification
description: Signal vs background classification in particle collision events.

name: Detector Simulation
description: Generative models to accelerate or replace GEANT4 detector simulation.

name: Anomaly Detection (HEP)
description: Model-agnostic searches for new physics via anomaly detection.

name: Fluid Dynamics
description: Neural surrogates and operators for solving Navier-Stokes and related PDEs.

name: Navier-Stokes
description: Direct numerical simulation surrogates for turbulent fluid flow.

name: Weather & Climate
description: ML-based weather forecasting and climate projection models.

name: Molecular Dynamics
description: Machine learning force fields and property prediction for molecules.
